creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
Phabricator summary by Miguel Gocobachi: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D25538

update version from 0.0.1 to 0.0.3

Because I am using it currently, I added two options.

    Make USB support optional
    Verbose mode optional

One of the things I dont want with my computer is having
those messages from iichid on the console, so I added the
verbose option.
